parameters.query: WITH body AS (SELECT convert_from(decode($1, 'base64'), 'UTF8')::jsonb AS j) INSERT INTO executions (app_id, app_version, workplace_id, worker_id) SELECT (j->>'app_id')::uuid, (SELECT current_version FROM apps WHERE id = (j->>'app_id')::uuid), j->>'workplace_id', j->>'worker_id' FROM body RETURNING id::text AS execution_id
